results.title: Impeller | KSB
results.snippet: Impeller An impeller is a rotating component equipped with vanes or blades used in turbomachinery (e.g. centrifugal pumps). Flow deflection at the impeller vanes allows mechanical power (energy at the vanes) to be converted into pump power output.

results.title: Impeller Size - an overview | ScienceDirect Topics
results.snippet: Impeller size refers to the dimensions of the impeller in a pump, which can significantly affect pump efficiency and is characterized by its diameter and shape.
